name: ernie-image
notes_low: Uses ERNIE-Image-Turbo FP8 community quant (~8.2GB, 8-step distilled). Pairs with ministral-3-3b text encoder, prompt enhancer, and flux2-vae. Targets ~12GB+ VRAM with --lowvram. Set NVFP4_SUPPORTED=true NVFP4_MODE=allow-community to swap to the ~4.8GB NVFP4 community quant.
notes_high: Uses ERNIE-Image SFT (~16GB BF16, ~50 steps) for top quality and instruction fidelity. Ships ministral-3-3b text encoder, prompt enhancer, and flux2-vae. Targets 24GB+ VRAM.
description: ERNIE-Image - Baidu's 8B Diffusion Transformer text-to-image model with strong text rendering, instruction following, and a built-in 3B Prompt Enhancer.
